---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## Motivation

**What problem does this solve?**

Why is this feature needed? What pain point does it address?

**Why is this feature needed?**

What use cases does this enable? Who would benefit from it?

## Proposed Solution

**How should it work?**

Provide a detailed description of how you envision this feature working.

Include:
- User-facing behavior
- API changes (if any)
- Configuration options (if any)
- Performance implications (if any)

## Alternatives Considered

**What other approaches did you think about?**

Describe alternative solutions you considered and why you prefer your proposal.

## Additional Context

**Examples, mockups, or references:**

Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.

## Complexity Assessment

- [ ] Simple: <1 day of work
- [ ] Medium: 1-3 days of work
- [ ] Complex: >3 days of work
- [ ] Requires research: Unknown complexity

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] Yes, but I need guidance
- [ ] No, I'm unable to implement it
- [ ] Maybe, after some discussion

## Priority

- [ ] Critical: Needed immediately
- [ ] High: Needed soon
- [ ] Medium: Nice to have
- [ ] Low: Backlog item
